title: Resonance-Free Traffic Signal Deployments
strategies: trivial: fix the last two intersections and use only phases {0,1} elsewhere -> 2^(n-2) schedules (reproduces the baseline)
greedy: use the full {0,1}^n hypercube (no phase-2) -> 2^n schedules, a maximal but not maximum cap
strong: product construction of maximal 9-schedule caps over disjoint blocks of three intersections (times a small base cap) -> ~9^(n/3), well above 2^n
open-ended frontier: true maximum cap sizes (20,45,112,236 for n=4..7) are research-hard; better orderings / heuristics keep improving
